testing_centers.notes: INBDE and NBDHE administered at PSI testing centers nationwide. Register and schedule through the JCNDE or ADHA candidate portal.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Computer-based format at PSI testing centers. INBDE is administered over 2 days. Scores are reported as scaled scores on a 49–99 scale.
renewal_options: INBDE and NBDHE scores do not expire under JCNDE/ADHA policy, but individual state dental boards may impose score age limits (commonly 5 years). Verify with the applicable state licensing board.

prerequisites.description: Graduation from or enrollment in final year of a CODA-accredited dental hygiene program

retake_policy.notes: 60-day waiting period between failed attempts. Maximum 3 attempts per calendar year for INBDE. Scores are generally valid for 5 years for most state licensure boards.
